name: Zhurong (with Tianwen-1 lander)
fact: China's first Mars rover. Operated 358 sols, traversed 1.92 km. Returned ground-penetrating radar evidence for buried subsurface layers consistent with ancient catastrophic flooding events. Lost contact during the 2022 Martian winter; CNSA confirmed no further communications.
capability: First non-US rover to operate on Mars; first GPR-equipped Martian rover.
